description: A compact water-and-soil-conservation field engineer companion for report drafting and technical review.

pet_notes: A compact non-animal mascot shaped like a friendly field notebook engineer, with a teal rain shell, clay-brown boots, subtle contour-map line accents, a small measuring staff strapped to the side, and an attentive reviewer expression; inspired by Chinese water and soil conservation report work, technical standards, field surveys, hydrology, erosion control, and clean Word-document QA; no readable text, no logos.
style_notes: Clean modern sticker mascot, full-body, crisp outline, readable at 192x208, restrained professional colors: teal, earth brown, moss green, white highlights, small amber marker accents.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `sticker`: Polished sticker mascot with bold clean shapes, crisp outline, flat colors, and minimal highlight detail. User style notes: Clean modern sticker mascot, full-body, crisp outline, readable at 192x208, restrained professional colors: teal, earth brown, moss green, white highlights, small amber marker accents..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
